title: calcitrapa sulphurea
intro: Calcitrapa sulphurea, also known as the Yellow Rocket or Wild Mustard, is a flowering plant in the Brassica family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Calcitrapa sulphurea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Calcitrapa sulphurea include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
